title: Souls in the Evas
wikitext:
[]: Souls in the Evas?             Quote Post by EvaUnit18 » Sun May 27, 2012 3:22 pm kay so in the original series as we all know the souls of the mothers of the children are in the evas with the exception of Rei.. but ive seen 1.0 and 2.0 and i havnt heard anything about souls being inside the evas. just wonderin if thats still the case or not. anyone know whats up on that?

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun May 27, 2012 5:59 pm The presence of souls in the Evangelions has not been confirmed so far. However, we do have some clues that the Evangelions have souls: - Unit-00 still went berserk and attacked the control room. - During Shinji's first fight, Unit-01 still acted independently. - When Mari started Beast Mode she unleashed something . There are even some clues as to the identity of Unit-01's soul: - Shinji remarks that Unit-01 smells like his mother (and like Rei). - During the Hell Train sequences that occur after Shinji loses consciousness inside Unit-01, both Yui and Rei always play a part. - Gendo calls Unit-01 "Yui" on one occasion. However, there is no conclusive evidence that Unit-01 houses Yui's soul again. In fact, there is a significant number of clues that Rei is somehow tied to Unit-01. (However, given that both Yui and Lilith's body were the common denominator between Rei and Unit-01 in the original series, this need not be surprising.)

[]:             Quote Post by EvaUnit18 » Sun May 27, 2012 7:18 pm you know thats actually true not that i remember. these days i havnt had much time to analyze the new evangelion they way i did with the original series. plus the new one isnt even finished yet. thanks for ur input it cleared a few things up for me

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 27, 2012 10:58 pm Jorno: We have Gendo calling Eva-01 "Yui" after the Eva independently rejects the dummy system. They're not being terribly subtle. A couple of notes: - The core that is retrieved from the 10th Angel, which contains Rei after she and Eva-00 are eaten, is specifically referred to as Eva-00's core in the script. I find it curious that Rei's entity would be collapsed into the Eva's core from its previous location in the entry plug... Should we think that something was already in there, and Rei 2 was simply combined with it? - We're told that the dummy system was make an Eva deploy an ATF without a pilot. If ATFs are still phenomena linked to souls, then this tidbit of information tells us that the Evas still have souls. Are we given any reason to think that the soul-ATF link is still present in NME? Well, one infographic says that Eva-01's ATF is originating from both core and plug. According to supplemental information, the entry plug is the "vessel of a soul" and its interior array is the "throne of a soul". Hmm...

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon May 28, 2012 4:40 am Reichu wrote: Jorno: We have Gendo calling Eva-01 "Yui" after the Eva independently rejects the dummy system. They're not being terribly subtle.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 28, 2012 8:50 am Jornophelanthas wrote: This would imply that Unit-01 only absorbed Unit-00's core, including Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon May 28, 2012 11:40 am Reichu wrote: Not at all. 10th Angel's body fluid reformed around the core, and both core and body merged into Eva-01.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 28, 2012 1:29 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: Finally, I should note that what could have been Unit-01's defining moment in the climax of the final battle in 2.0, was actually driven by Shinji, not his Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon May 28, 2012 3:02 pm Reichu wrote: What Shinji and Rei have done, according to Fuyutsuki, is "awaken" Eva-01, and Gendo is pretty chill about this.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 28, 2012 4:56 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: My conclusion is that this process of awakening started BEFORE Rei got involved. To what extent is Rei then necessary for Unit-01 achieving divine power?

[]:             Quote Post by EvaUnit18 » Mon May 28, 2012 6:18 pm (i dont know how to do that quote thing so i copied and pasted what reichu said) "Since you've reminded me In changing its pattern to Eva-00's (not Rei's Eva-00's), 10th reconfigures its body into a distorted white feminine figure bearing... no real resemblance to Eva-00, beside being humanoid. I'll pose the question, without having a clear-cut answer myself why is this?" i actually had an immediate thought on this the first time i saw it. when the angel changed into Rei and had no resemblance of unit 00 what so ever i thought back to the original series and the controversy to Rei 1s soul being split in to 2. one half in unit 00 and the other in Rei 2. if its still the same case for rebuild then that might be why the angel took on an image looking more like Rei then unit 00 cuz the 2 halfs are joined again. and whats NME?[/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 28, 2012 8:52 pm Reichu wrote: BTW, depending on your subs, a rewatch might not be illuminating. I've seen translations that manage to really bury what's going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 28, 2012 9:25 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Which subtitles in your opinion are the best for 2.22 and 1.11?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue May 29, 2012 1:03 am EvaUnit18 wrote: and whats NME?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 29, 2012 1:48 am Warren Peace wrote: What people who fight the future call Rebuild

[]: Souls in the Evas             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Jul 10, 2012 5:38 pm I am just curious at the moment because that soul stuff popped up again in the other thread. I know that not all NGE stuff applies to NME, but that soul stuff/compatibility never bugged me... My assumption always has been, that the red core of the Evangelion is the throne of the soul. When Eva 01 absorbed Yui, she went "there". Since souls can be transfered etc, there needs to be something physical. And well, where else should it be? In Episode 19, Zeruel goes straight for the core And I thought that the thing, that they remove from Unit 02 in Evangelion 2.22 is the same thing. What else shall it be? In NME they just have the technology to swap the souls. When Mari hijacked Eva 02, Eva 02 had another core... isnt that whats said in the background before she enters 02? I thought she got a core, thats compatible with her... if she would have tried to control Unit 02 before with Asukas core, she wouldnt have had success. Maybe this is just BS, if so - enlighten me :)
summary:
[]: Souls in the Evas?             Quote Post by EvaUnit18 » Sun May 27, 2012 3:22 pm kay so in the original series as we all know the souls of the mothers of the children are in the evas with the exception of Rei.. but ive seen 1.0 and 2.0 and i havnt heard anything about souls being inside the evas. just wonderin if thats still the case or not. anyone know whats up on that?

endo calling Eva-01 "Yui" after the Eva independently rejects the dummy system. They're not being terribly subtle.
